017package org.apache.juneau.commons.settings;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
020
021import java.util.function.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.runtime.*;
024
025/**
026 * Property source backed by {@link Args}.
027 */
028public class ArgsPropertySource implements PropertySource {
029
030   private final Supplier<Args> argsSupplier;
031
032   /**
033    * Constructor.
034    *
035    * @param argsSupplier Supplier for args.
036    */
037   public ArgsPropertySource(Supplier<Args> argsSupplier) {
038      this.argsSupplier = argsSupplier;
039   }
040
041   /**
042    * Creates a source using the default command-line discovery.
043    *
044    * @return A new source.
045    */
046   public static ArgsPropertySource createDefault() {
047      return new ArgsPropertySource(ArgsPropertySource::createDefaultArgs);
048   }
049
050   public static Args createDefaultArgs() {
051      var s = System.getProperty("sun.java.command");
052      if (ne(s)) {
053         var i = s.indexOf(' ');
054         return new Args(i == -1 ? "" : s.substring(i + 1));
055      }
056      return new Args(System.getProperty("juneau.args", ""));
057   }
058
059   @Override
060   public PropertyLookupResult get(String name) {
061      var args = argsSupplier.get();
062      if (args == null)
063         return PropertyLookupResult.missing();
064      try {
065         var index = Integer.parseInt(name);
066         var v = args.get(index);
067         return v.isPresent() ? PropertyLookupResult.present(v) : PropertyLookupResult.missing();
068      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
069         // Fall through.
070      }
071      var values = args.getAll(name);
072      if (! values.isEmpty())
073         return PropertyLookupResult.present(opt(String.join(",", values)));
074      var v = args.get(name);
075      return v.isPresent() ? PropertyLookupResult.present(v) : PropertyLookupResult.missing();
076   }
077}
